author: doll-agent
content:
Companion to qnd-trial-intel-rs#4 (umbrella qnd-trial-intel-rs#3). This module is the Phase 0a deliverable for the Rust port of qnd-trial-intel.

## Scope
New module ferrolearn-bayes/src/conjugate/normal_normal.rs:

```rust
pub fn posterior_normal_normal(
    prior_mean: f64,
    prior_var: f64,
    observations: &[(f64 /* y_i */, f64 /* obs_var_i */)],
) -> (f64 /* post_mean */, f64 /* post_var */);
```

Closed-form normal-normal conjugate update:
- precision_prior = 1 / prior_var
- precision_obs_i = 1 / obs_var_i
- post_precision = precision_prior + sum(precision_obs_i)
- post_mean = (precision_prior * prior_mean + sum(precision_obs_i * y_i)) / post_precision
- post_var = 1 / post_precision

## Crate metadata update
Update ferrolearn-bayes/Cargo.toml description, keywords, categories to drop the naive-Bayes-only framing — the crate now also exposes conjugate priors.

## Acceptance
- proptest suite with >=10000 random cases matching a NumPy reference to 1e-9 absolute tolerance
- handles obs_var_i <= 0 by clipping to a small epsilon (matches Python estimate/bayesian.py:68)
- doctest example
- README section under 'Conjugate priors'

## Consumer
qnd-trial-intel-rs uses this in qnd-trial-intel-estimate::bayesian::compute_posterior. Until released, consumed as a workspace path dependency.
